pos_examples: Now, prepare pipeline obj_15 with credential star_213 in runner pool frame_9.
Once you are done, please bind rule set roof_11 to pipeline obj_15.
First, execute evaluation profile yew on pipeline obj_15 using analyzer plugin socket and rule set roof_11 and then promote pipeline obj_15 via final gate.
The next step is to mark credentials for pipeline obj_15 as ready using runner pool frame_9 and credential star_213.
